titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Mualla Ibn Muhammad Al-baṣri
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Mualla Ibn Muhammad Al-baṣri

segments: ه عن المعلّى بن محمّد البصريّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن المعلّى ابن محمّد البصريّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن المعلّى بن محمّد البصريّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن المعلّى ابن محمّد البصريّ‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Al-Mualla ibn Muhammad Al-Baṣri, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from Al-Mualla ibn Muhammad Al-Baṣri.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Al-Mualla ibn Muhammad Al-Baṣri, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from Al-Mualla ibn Muhammad Al-Baṣri.
